hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); ver=""; if [[ "$cmd" =~ git[[:space:]]+tag([[:space:]]+-[asfm][[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]*)*[[:space:]]+v([0-9][^[:space:]]*) ]]; then ver="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"; elif [[ "$cmd" =~ git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]+)+[[:space:]]+v([0-9][^[:space:]]*) ]]; then ver="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"; fi; [[ -z "$ver" ]] && exit 0; ver="${ver%% *}"; changelog="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/CHANGELOG.md"; if [[ ! -f "$changelog" ]] || ! grep -qE "^## \[${ver//./\\.}\] — [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}" "$changelog"; then jq -n --arg v "$ver" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "BLOCKED: CHANGELOG.md missing dated entry for \($v). Add `## [\($v)] — YYYY-MM-DD` before tagging/pushing."}}'; fi; exit 0
